Title: Luns, Th. M. H.
Subject Area: Baroque|Dutch (culture or style)|Dutch Golden Age|Northern Renaissance|painting (visual works)
Overview: Hals and Dutch Baroque painting scholar. Luns was one of the scholars who accepted the opinion of Abraham Bredius and his opinion that the Christ at Emmaus painting was a Vermeer, later proved to have been painted by forger Han van Meegeren (1889-1947).
